title: AIICO Insurance Announces Board of Directors Meeting Date
description: The board of AIICO Insurance Plc, will meet on January 19, 2023 to review and approve the draft unaudited financial statements for the period ended December 31, 2022. Any decision reached as it affect
html:
The board of AIICO Insurance Plc, will meet on January 19, 2023 to review and approve the draft unaudited financial statements for the period ended December 31, 2022.

Any decision reached as it affects the approval of the accounts will immediately be communicated to Nigerian Exchange Limited (NGX).

In compliance with the provisions of Rule 17.18(a): Closed Period, Rulebook of the Exchange, 2015 (Issuers’ Rule) as amended, the Company commenced its Closed Period from January 1, 2023, until twenty-four (24) hours after the release of the company’s fourth quarter result for 2022 and the 2022 audited financial statements to the public.

During the closed period, no director, person discharging managerial responsibilities and advisers of the Company shall deal in the securities of the Company.
